concepts.headline: Nine hundred stars in 48 hours.
concepts.subtext: Mike, the open-source legal AI, launched and the developer community responded immediately.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout. Headline at top-left with generous padding. Four stat tiles arranged in a 2x2 grid on the right half of the canvas, using DM Mono for values. Particle network dots scattered in top-right periphery. FLYWHEEL watermark behind content at 0.03 opacity. Warm accent bar at top of each stat tile.

layout_spec.headline_position: top-left at 14% from top, 80px left padding
layout_spec.stat_position: right half, center-right at 55% from left
layout_spec.accent_placement: thin 2px warm sand bar atop each stat tile
layout_spec.emphasis_area: headline and top-left stat tile with 900+

concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #000000, stat values #000000 in DM Mono, stat labels #6b7a7c, accent bars #d7c8af, particle dots #000000 at 0.06 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The 900+ stars and 200+ forks within 48 hours are the most compelling data story. A multi-stat panel presents these concrete numbers with editorial authority, letting the figures speak without embellishment. Square tile geometry and DM Mono reinforce the technical, developer-focused context.
visualization_goals: Show the rapid growth of Mike's GitHub stars (900+) and forks (200+) within just 48 hours of launch to highlight viral adoption momentum
Illustrate the ecosystem of community-built extensions emerging around Mike, such as the CourtListener API integration, to convey early developer engagement
Compare Mike's open-source launch trajectory to similar tools like OpenClaw to contextualize its growth within the legal tech open-source space
Visualize the diverse use cases emerging from Mike's launch, including local deployments for secure legal workflows and third-party API integrations

concepts.headline: Nine hundred stars in 48 hours.
concepts.subtext: Mike, the open-source legal AI, forked 200+ times and already has community-built extensions live.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout with hero stat dominating the canvas. '900+' rendered at extreme scale (120px, DM Mono) as the visual anchor, centered slightly left-of-center. Headline sits above in restrained 28px weight. Subtext below in 16px secondary gray. Particle network concentrated in top-right and bottom-right corners. FLYWHEEL watermark at 0.03 opacity behind the hero number. Warm sand glow behind the stat.

layout_spec.headline_position: upper-left quadrant, 80px from left, 20% from top
layout_spec.stat_position: center canvas, slightly left-of-center at 45% from left
layout_spec.accent_placement: 2px warm sand horizontal bar above the headline block
layout_spec.whitespace_distribution: generous 60% negative space, particle dots in right periphery
layout_spec.emphasis_area: hero stat '900+' as dominant visual element

concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, hero stat #000000 DM Mono, headline #000000, subtext #6b7a7c, accent bar #d7c8af, warm sand shadow rgba(215,200,175,0.25) behind stat
concepts.reasoning: A single hero statistic communicates the viral momentum of Mike's launch with maximum editorial impact. The '900+' number at scale creates instant comprehension. This modality strips everything away except the essential signal, embodying Flywheel's philosophy of communicating authority through restraint.
visualization_goals: Show the rapid growth of Mike's GitHub stars (900+) and forks (200+) within just 48 hours of launch to highlight viral adoption momentum
Illustrate the ecosystem of community-built extensions emerging around Mike, such as the CourtListener API integration, to convey early developer engagement
Compare Mike's open-source launch trajectory to similar tools like OpenClaw to contextualize its growth within the legal tech open-source space
Visualize the diverse use cases emerging from Mike's launch, including local deployments for secure legal workflows and third-party API integrations

concepts.headline: Forty-eight hours. Real developer momentum.
concepts.subtext: Mike's open-source launch generated immediate community engagement across stars, forks, and live integrations.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored structured data layout. Headline and subtext occupy the left third of the canvas, stacked vertically with generous spacing. Horizontal bar chart fills the right two-thirds, bars left-aligned from a shared axis. Bar values in DM Mono. Grid lines at 0.08 opacity. FLYWHEEL watermark at 0.03 behind the chart area. Particle dots in upper-right corner.

layout_spec.headline_position: left third, vertically centered, 80px from left
layout_spec.stat_position: right two-thirds, chart bars from 38% to 88% of canvas width
layout_spec.accent_placement: 2px warm sand vertical bar separating headline column from chart
layout_spec.emphasis_area: GitHub Stars bar as longest and most visually dominant

concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, bars #000000, bar value labels #000000 DM Mono, axis labels #6b7a7c, accent divider #d7c8af, grid lines #000000 at 0.08 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The bar chart contextualizes Mike's launch across multiple dimensions of community engagement, not just stars. The asymmetric scale between 900 stars and smaller extension/deployment numbers creates a visually interesting contrast that tells the story of a viral open-source launch.
visualization_goals: Show the rapid growth of Mike's GitHub stars (900+) and forks (200+) within just 48 hours of launch to highlight viral adoption momentum
Illustrate the ecosystem of community-built extensions emerging around Mike, such as the CourtListener API integration, to convey early developer engagement
Compare Mike's open-source launch trajectory to similar tools like OpenClaw to contextualize its growth within the legal tech open-source space
Visualize the diverse use cases emerging from Mike's launch, including local deployments for secure legal workflows and third-party API integrations

selection_reasoning: The stat_callout concept best embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint philosophy. The '900+' hero number at extreme scale communicates the viral launch story in a single glance, with no explanation required. The warm off-white background, particle network periphery, and DM Mono typography create a premium, publication-quality graphic. It removes all unnecessary elements and lets the data carry the narrative, exactly as Flywheel's brand philosophy demands.
